title: drymocallis rupestris subsp. mollis
intro: Drymocallis rupestris subsp. mollis, also known as smooth dryad or smooth twinflower, is a flowering plant species native to western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, due to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids. Herbal preparations of Drymocallis rupestris subsp. mollis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
